_description: Standard flag structure for all IAHE DPR Reviewer compliance findings

definitions.CRITICAL: Design safety, clearance, or load-bearing non-compliance — construction cannot proceed without resolution
definitions.MAJOR: Code non-compliance that significantly affects design quality, cost, or safety — must be resolved before DPR approval
definitions.MINOR: Deviation from best practice or minor code non-compliance — should be addressed in next revision
definitions.OBSERVATION: Suggestion for improved design or documentation — for PE consideration
definitions.VERIFY: Citation from training knowledge with connector offline — engineer must independently verify

item.description: Short description of what is being checked

location.description: Chainage, bridge name, sheet number, or DPR section reference

found.description: Value or condition found in the DPR

required.description: Value or condition required by the applicable code

code_reference.description: Full code citation including code number, clause/table

confidence.description: For drawing-reviewer only — confidence of extracted dimension

cross_volume_check_id.description: CV-01 through CV-10 if this flag is from a cross-volume consistency check

example_flags.item: Horizontal curve radius below minimum for design speed
example_flags.required: R ≥ 250 m for V = 100 kmph, Plain terrain
example_flags.recommendation: Revise alignment to increase curve radius to ≥ 250 m or reduce design speed with authority concurrence

example_flags.item: Design traffic inconsistent between traffic and pavement chapters
example_flags.location: Pavement Design Report, Section 3.2 vs Traffic Chapter, Table 5.1
example_flags.required: Traffic chapter states 150 msa — must match
example_flags.recommendation: Reconcile design traffic across all chapters; use 150 msa consistently

example_flags.item: Vertical clearance below minimum above HFL
example_flags.recommendation: Raise soffit level or lower HFL basis — verify hydrological data and revise GAD

example_flags.location: Sheet CRS-003, Typical Cross-Section Ch. 12–18 km
example_flags.required: 26.5 m for 4-lane divided NH per IRC:SP:84:2014
example_flags.recommendation: Revise cross-section to provide 26.5 m formation width
